forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Becoming cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending south to southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Becoming cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending southerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 11:20am to 12:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h shifting southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the west. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Patchy morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 21.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Becoming cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending south to southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.

Mostly sunny. Patchy morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 21.
Sun protection 10:30am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Becoming cloudy. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending southerly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 10:50am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 26.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers west of Nullarbor, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly in the middle of the day then turning east to northeasterly in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Coober Pedy, slight chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 24.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the far west, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Coober Pedy in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog south of Leigh Creek. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 22.
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.
